reference: Hi doctor, please help me. I took a semen analysis test yesterday. The results are shown below. Sir, please analyze and tell me if my condition is normal or not. Can I become a father? Sperm count is ninety-nine million. Sperm motility is: progressive motile - twenty-six%, non-progressive - thirty%, immotile - forty-four%. pH - eight, volume - one, normal forms of sperms - ninety-six% and abnormal are four%. Pus cells are four-six%.
text: Hi doctor, please help me. I took a semen analysis test yesterday. The results are shown below. Sir, please analyze and tell me if my condition is normal or not. Can I become a father? Sperm count is ninety-nine million. Sperm motility is progressive motile, twenty-six percent nonprogressive, two percent immotile, forty-four percent. pH eight, or volume one. Normal forms of sperm: ninety-six percent, and abnormal are four percent plus offal six percent.
